sql_queries.get_statement_date: SELECT data FROM temp_extraction_results WHERE currency IS NULL AND sectionheader = 'Statement Date' LIMIT 1;
sql_queries.get_section_list: SELECT currency, sectiontype, sectionheader FROM (SELECT DISTINCT currency, sectiontype, sectionheader FROM temp_extraction_results WHERE currency IS NOT NULL AND sectionheader != 'Multi-currency Account Net Equity') AS t ORDER BY CASE WHEN currency = 'USD' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, currency, sectiontype, sectionheader;
sql_queries.get_section_data: SELECT data FROM temp_extraction_results WHERE currency = '{currency}' AND sectiontype = '{sectiontype}' AND sectionheader = '{sectionheader}' ORDER BY {order_by};

PurchaseAndSale.Heading: Purchase and Sale
PurchaseAndSale.order_by: recordtype COLLATE "C" NULLS LAST, date NULLS LAST

sql_queries.fetch_staging_tables: SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = '{schema_name}' AND tablename LIKE '{table_name_pattern}'
